title: leptothrium inerme
intro: Leptothrium inerme, also known as Indian pennywort or gotukola, is a perennial plant native to the Indian subcontinent. It is a creeping herb with small leaves that has been used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cognitive-enhancing effects. The health benefits of Leptothrium inerme include reducing stress and anxiety, improving memory and cognitive function, and supporting liver health, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Leptothrium inerme can be prepared in various forms, including teas, capsules, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
